direction_diversity.policy: Direction diversity is measured after retrieval; the classifier is prohibited from preselecting visual recipes.

methodology.hybrid: Canonical corpus with constraints-only classification, diversified pre-lock retrieval, metadata, exact/lexical scoring, deterministic concept expansion, reranking, dedupe, reserved mandatory capacity, source-family limits, and budgets.
methodology.latency_note: Latency is observed wall time and therefore informational, while relevance scoring and selection are deterministic for a fixed corpus.
methodology.lexical: Canonical corpus with metadata and exact/keyword scoring; synonym expansion disabled.
methodology.static-skill: Small offline mandatory kernel, capped at five records.

results.name: Premium/pro source cannot be copied without entitlement and terms
Awwwards, Mobbin, and Page Flows remain inspiration-only
Complex accessible widgets route to maintained primitives
21st.dev MCP is optional tooling rather than design authority
Corporate event marketing is excluded from pullable catalogs
Discovery produces deterministic candidate reports without promotion
